form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 4th of 7 at this track on March 28 over 1700m, 7 len behind Chronicle King with 58kg at $2.80. Before that favourite; won by 1.75 len at Turffontein Inside February 26 over 1600m defeating Bristol Hercules with 57kg at $2.70. Capable of more ? worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Racing well recently. At the latest run 4th of 7 at this track on March 28 over 1700m, 7 len behind Chronicle King with 58kg at $2.80. Before that favourite; won by 1.75 len at Turffontein Inside February 26 over 1600m defeating Bristol Hercules with 57kg at $2.70. Capable of more ? worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Carried in by The Last Duke at approximately the 150m.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start won by 2.5 len at this track April 2 over 1450m defeating Oklahoma Smokeshow carrying 60kg at $3. The run before that 3rd of 7 at Turffontein Inside on February 26 over 1600m, 2 len behind King Harald with 56.5kg at $6.50. Won here over a similar trip last time and building a good record. Has upside and no reason he cannot salute again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1). Recent form sound. Last start won by 2.5 len at this track April 2 over 1450m defeating Oklahoma Smokeshow carrying 60kg at $3. The run before that 3rd of 7 at Turffontein Inside on February 26 over 1600m, 2 len behind King Harald with 56.5kg at $6.50. Won here over a similar trip last time and building a good record. Has upside and no reason he cannot salute again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced extremely green, shifted both ways away from the crop from the 250m.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 20 at Turffontein Standside in the G1 Summer Cup November 29 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Mocha Blend with 54kg at $101. First up last campaign seventh of 12 at Turffontein Standside in the G3 November 9 over 1800m, 5.5 len behind The Ultimate King with 57kg at $41. Not without claims this far easier company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-17.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 20 at Turffontein Standside in the G1 Summer Cup November 29 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Mocha Blend with 54kg at $101. First up last campaign seventh of 12 at Turffontein Standside in the G3 November 9 over 1800m, 5.5 len behind The Ultimate King with 57kg at $41. Not without claims this far easier company.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in in the concluding stages.
At the 300m directed outwards into clear running and commenced to hang out.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran last of 13 at this track on March 28 over 1200m, 14 len behind The Specialist carrying 56kg at $6.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Turffontein Inside on October 11 over 1450m, 0.5 len behind Chronicle King with 57kg at $2.80. Fitter and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Second-up. First-up after four months ran last of 13 at this track on March 28 over 1200m, 14 len behind The Specialist carrying 56kg at $6.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Turffontein Inside on October 11 over 1450m, 0.5 len behind Chronicle King with 57kg at $2.80. Fitter and worth including.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last run ran last of 7 at this track on March 28 over 1700m, 18 len behind Chronicle King carrying 58kg at $21. At only start last preparation second last in a small field at Turffontein Standside on October 26 over 1600m, 4 len behind The Equator with 59kg at $34. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in away from the crop from the 150m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 40 day let-up. At the latest run second last of 8 at this track on March 5 over 1800m, slow going 5.5 len behind Duchess Of Paloma with 55kg at $9. Before that 5th of 7 at Turffontein Inside on February 19 over 2000m, 5 len behind Kissing Machine carrying 56.5kg at $5. Impossible to entertain.
